title: boechera fructicosa
intro: Boechera fructicosa, also known as the mountain bladdera, is a perennial plant in the mustard family native to North America. The medicinal properties of Boechera fructicosa are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Boechera fructicosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, but proper dosing and preparation should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
